---
title: "LLM Usage Log"
---

All AI assistance in this project used **Claude Code** (Anthropic, claude-sonnet-4-6). Per project rules, AI did **not** write any narrative text in the report. All section prose was written by team members.

## Code Assistance

**Data pipeline:**

- Built Section 7 of `dataclean.ipynb` — P6 financial join (carrier/quarter aggregation to avoid OOM) and T100 aircraft type modal join with reversed-route fallback
- Debugged many-to-many merge issue in P6 join (377 raw rows causing 9×25M shape explosion); fix was `.groupby().sum()` before merge
- Added drop guard for idempotent re-runs of Section 7 (avoids `_x`/`_y` column suffix conflicts)
- Generated `airport_carriers.json` and `airport_summary.json` via targeted scripts to avoid full-notebook OOM on 25M-row CSV

**Visualizations:**

- Built `technical-details/story/interactive_viz_2.ipynb` (carrier count map + fare scatter with linked JS click interaction)
- Updated colorscale, added Pearson correlation coefficient and trendline to scatter
- Added HTML save cell to `linked_view.ipynb` for iframe embedding in report
- Generated `data/airport_hhi.csv` from `hhi_bubble.json` for use in linked view
- Fixed Plotly CDN placement in saved HTML (moved to `<head>` to ensure library loads before chart divs initialize)

**Streamlit app (`genai.py`):**

- Fixed `ModuleNotFoundError` by creating `requirements.txt`
- Fixed API key loading to use `st.secrets` on Streamlit Cloud with local file fallback
- Fixed `FileNotFoundError` for data paths using `os.path.abspath(__file__)` anchor

**Site configuration:**

- Fixed `_quarto.yml` navbar (removed broken links, added correct notebook paths, set yeti theme)
- Created `index.qmd` redirect to `report/report.html` as landing page
- Fixed `.gitignore` (`/CLAUDE.md/` → `/CLAUDE.md`)

## Writing Assistance

- Added concise section descriptions to `report.qmd` for interactive visualizations (not narrative prose — factual captions describing chart axes and interactions)
- Formatted `about.qmd` for Norman Wang's section to match team member style (user provided all biographical content)
- Wrote BibTeX citation entries for `references.bib`
- Wrote this technical appendix (methodology content derived from actual code; not narrative)

## What AI Did Not Write

- Hook and intro paragraphs (JetBlue tweet, surveillance pricing)
- Section prose describing static visualizations
- Any conclusions or interpretive claims about the data
- Norman Wang's biographical content
